news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Protara Therapeutics, Inc. appointed Leonardo Viana Nicacio, M.D., as their new Chief Medical Officer. Protara, listed on Nasdaq as TARA, focuses on developing innovative treatments for cancer and rare diseases. Dr. Nicacio joins the company with almost two decades of expertise in oncology, drug development, regulatory affairs, and commercial operations gained from various prominent biopharmaceutical and health technology firms.
news.headline: Protara Therapeutics appoints Dr. Leonardo Viana Nicacio as Chief Medical Officer; brings 20 years of experience.
Elon Musk's company, Inc, speculates on the disappearance of 'DOGE'. -Bloomberg site

news.summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) based in San Francisco, has revealed its schedule for the 2025 Annual General Meeting of Stockholders. The meeting is set to take place on Wednesday, May 28, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. PT (10:00 a.m. ET) and will be held online. SoFi is known for offering a wide range of digital financial services aimed at assisting members with borrowing, saving, spending, investing, and money protection. The upcoming Annual Meeting provides an opportunity for stakeholders to engage and participate virtually.
news.headline: SoFi plans to host its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders on May 28, 2025, at 7:00am PT. Meeting will be held virtually.

news.summary: Denver-based Sitio Royalties Corp. (NYSE: STR) released a preview of their first quarter 2025 performance, showcasing significant operational and financial figures. The company will disclose complete results for this quarter on May 7, 2025, after the NYSE market close. An earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for May 8, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. CT / 8:30 a.m. ET for stakeholders and investors. Further information regarding participation can be accessed internally.
news.headline: Sitio Royalties Corp. previews Q1 2025 financials, to report full results on May 7, 2025 at NYSE. Conference set for May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In Chicago, The AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK), known for its high-quality outdoor living products, will be sharing its fiscal Q2 2025 results after the market closes on May 6, 2025. This includes popular items like TimberTech® Decking, Versatex®, and AZEK® Trim, as well as StruXure® pergolas. Following the release, a conference call will take place to delve into the details. Stay tuned for more information on this event.
news.headline: The AZEK Company Inc. will release fiscal Q2 2025 results on May 6, 2025, including TimberTech®, Versatex®, and AZEK® Trim brands.

news.summary: Based in Irvine, California, 1031 Crowdfunding is a prominent real estate crowdfunding platform specializing in 1031 exchanges and investment opportunities centered on tax deferral. They recently highlighted the positive effects of an investment made via their 1031CF Bridge Fund III program. Partnering with Cima Investment Group, they acquired the Dorset Place Community in Oklahoma City. This housing complex is being converted from an assisted living facility into a secure environment for homeless veterans. The initiative aims to provide these veterans with a safe and supportive place to live.
news.headline: 1031 Crowdfunding aids Dorset Place's transformation for veterans; in partnership with Cima Investment Group.

news.summary: In New York, 1stdibs.com, Inc. (Nasdaq: DIBS), a prominent platform for unique design items, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Friday, May 9, 2025, in a press release before the market opens. Interested parties can find the press release on the 1stDibs Investor Relations website (investors.1stdibs.com). Additionally, a webcast to review these results is scheduled at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, which can be accessed through the company's Investor Relations platform.
news.headline: 1stdibs (Nasdaq: DIBS) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 9, 2025; earnings webcast at 8:00 am Eastern Time.

news.summary: Milestone Scientific Inc. has expanded its CompuFlo Epidural System adoption across various pain management clinics and ambulatory surgery centers after Medicare price assignment in multiple U.S. states. The company reported $8.6 million in revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to $9.8 million in 2023. Despite a decrease in revenue, the company saw growth in e-commerce sales, with U.S. e-commerce revenue reaching approximately $5.1 million in 2024. International revenue declined to approximately $3.4 million in 2024. Operating loss reduced to $6.8 million in 2024 from $7.1 million in 2023, while net loss was approximately $4.7 million in 2024. Milestone Scientific has focused on streamlining operations and expanding its market reach through partnerships and federal contracts. The company remains optimistic about its growth potential in both dental and medical segments.
news.headline: Milestone Scientific reports $8.6M revenue for 2024, plans to expand CompuFlo Epidural System; 95M injections given with STA System.

news.summary: Global research and consulting company Info-Tech Research Group will host its popular IGNITE series in Detroit, Michigan on May 7, 2025. The event will be held at the Westin Book Cadillac Detroit and aims to bring together IT and business leaders from the region. Attendees will have the opportunity to network with expert analysts and advisors throughout the one-day event.
news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group to host IGNITE 2025 event in Detroit on May 7, connecting IT leaders with experts at Westin Book Cadillac Detroit.

news.summary: Based in Fort Lee, New Jersey, Pioneer Power Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPSI) disclosed its finalized financial outcomes for Q4 and the entire year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, known for its expertise in developing, producing, maintaining, and incorporating distributed energy resources, power generation tools, and portable electric vehicle ("EV") charging options, had initially revealed preliminary figures on February 19, 2025. Today's announcement signifies the conclusion of this reporting period.
news.headline: Pioneer Power releases final financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, after preliminary results on Feb 19, 2025.
Trump: I will make it easier for farmers and hotels.

news.summary: Following the Medicare price assignment in multiple states, the CompuFlo® Epidural System is now being implemented in more pain management clinics and ambulatory surgery centers across the US. This expansion has led to a significant increase in the availability of the system, with a growing number of facilities adopting it for their procedures. This move is in response to the positive reception and demand for the system, indicating its effectiveness and value in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: Milestone Scientific reports 2024 financial results, sees positive outlook for 2025 with CompuFlo® Epidural System expansion.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Limassol, Cyprus, Toro Corp (NASDAQ: TORO), a global energy transportation services company, disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20‐F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report encompasses the audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year finishing on December 31, 2024.
news.headline: Toro Corp. releases 2024 Annual Report with audited financials on Form 20-F. Filed with SEC. (LIMASSOL, Cyprus, April 15, 2025)

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Diginex Limited revealed a partnership with AIKYA, an AI & big data technology firm boasting roughly 2.5 million users. This collaboration will introduce diginexESG, Diginex's acclaimed ESG reporting platform, in Malaysia. The agreement, inked on March 18, 2025, involved an upfront license fee tranche paid to Diginex today. The primary objective of this strategic alliance is to enable Malaysian enterprises to bolster ESG transparency, simplify adherence to regulations, and boost sustainable finance efforts, aligned with Malaysia's sustainability targets.
news.headline: Diginex Limited partners with AIKYA to launch diginexESG in Malaysia, targeting 2.5 million users; seeks to boost ESG reporting and sustainable finance.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Cardiff Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRDF) based in San Diego disclosed the granting of non-qualified stock options to acquire 35,040 shares of its common stock to a new employee. These stock options were given as part of the inducement for the new employee to join the company, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Cardiff Oncology focuses on leveraging PLK1 inhibition to create innovative therapies for various cancers and operates as a clinical-stage biotechnology company.
news.headline: Cardiff Oncology granted an inducement of 35,040 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq rule.

news.summary: In McKinney, Texas, on April 15, 2025, Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) has disclosed the upcoming live audio webcast for its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders set for Thursday, April 24, 2025, at 10:00am Central Time. Interested individuals can register online to participate in the event by visiting proxypush.com/GL. Those who are registered...
news.headline: Globe Life Inc. to hold virtual 2025 shareholders' meeting on April 24 at 10am Central, register at proxypush.com/GL.

news.summary: A recent study conducted in Guilford, Connecticut, explored the effectiveness and patient satisfaction of a portable MRI device powered by artificial intelligence (AI) in neurology offices. The study analyzed how this innovative technology could benefit clinicians and patients.
news.headline: Hyperfine enrolls initial patients in NEURO PMR study to evaluate AI-powered portable MRI in neurology offices.

news.summary: Chicago-based CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: CCCS), a prominent cloud platform for the P&C insurance industry, stated that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31, 2025, before the U.S. financial markets commence on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Concurrently, the company plans to conduct a conference call on the morning of Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) to deliberate on the firm's financial performance.
news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions will report Q1 2025 earnings on May 6, 2025, before U.S. markets open with a conference call at 8:00 am ET.

news.summary: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. (NASDAQ: FYBR) based in Dallas has disclosed that it will divulge its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. This announcement comes in the wake of an ongoing acquisition deal between Frontier and Verizon Communications Inc., which was first announced on September 4, 2024. In this agreement, Verizon is set to acquire Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. The exact financial figures and additional details regarding the acquisition are yet to be unveiled during the upcoming disclosure.
news.headline: Frontier will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025. Verizon to acquire Frontier Communications Parent, Inc.

news.summary: Ride-hailing company Lyft, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYFT) is set to announce its financial performance for Q1 2025 after the market closes on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Following this release, Lyft will conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day to delve into the financial results and key business achievements. For those interested, the live audio webcast can be accessed via the company's Investor Relations page at https://investor.lyft.com/. The webcast will also be archived for later access.
news.headline: Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) to announce first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, after market close. Call at 2:00pm PT.

news.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) is set to announce its financial results for the fiscal quarter and fiscal year ending March 31, 2025 after market close on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. Alongside the release, EA will conduct a conference call to analyze the financial outcomes for the mentioned periods, as well as provide insights into future projections and potential significant updates impacting its business or financial standing. This signifies a crucial event for investors and industry observers to gain valuable information regarding EA's performance and direction.
news.headline: EA will release its fiscal Q4 and FY2025 results on May 6, 2025. Conference call to follow.

news.headline: Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) will report fiscal Q3 2025 results on April 29, 2025 after market close. Conference call at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) is set to announce its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 on Thursday, May 8th, 2025 post market closure. news.summary: Seattle-based Starbucks Coffee Company (Nasdaq: SBUX) has announced that it will report its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 after the market closes on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. A replay of the webcast will be available on the same website until the end of the day on Friday, June 13, 20.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Flamingo Therapeutics revealed that an abstract has been approved for showcasing at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) annual meeting in Chicago, IL. The company, headquartered in Leuven, Belgium, and Strasbourg, France, along with a presence in Philadelphia, shared this significant development.
news.headline: Flamingo Therapeutics presents on immune-modulatory effects of Danvatirsen at AACR. Abstract accepted at meeting in Chicago.

news.summary: Resideo Technologies, Inc., headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, is a prominent global company specializing in manufacturing, developing, and distributing technology-based sensing and control products for residential and commercial sectors. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol REZI, will be disclosing its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Resideo (NYSE: REZI) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025. Leading tech manufacturer for residential and commercial markets.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) revealed key appointments within its retail divisions. Joe Kelley has been appointed Senior Vice President of Retail Divisions, while Kenny Kimball takes on the role of Smith's Division President, Chris Albi as King Soopers Division President, and Kendra Doyel as Food 4 Less Division President. This update came on April 15, 2025, from Cincinnati.
news.headline: Kroger appoints key leaders: Joe Kelley SVP, Kenny Kimball Smith's Div President, Chris Albi King Soopers Div President, Kendra Doyel Food 4 Less Div President. CINCINNATI, April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario on April 15, 2025, Cymat Technologies Ltd. disclosed that they have obtained the green light from the TSX Venture Exchange for their non-brokered private placement of equity Units. The Company, known as Cymat, is listed as TSXV: CYM and OTCQB: CYMHF. This news marks a significant development for Cymat as they proceed with the Offering.
news.headline: Cymat Technologies Ltd. receives TSX-V approval for $1.3M private placement financing.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, in Alhambra, California, Astrana Health, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTH) - a prominent healthcare organization facilitating accessible care via technology - made a significant announcement. This company, along with its subsidiaries, is at the forefront of empowering providers.

news.summary: Austin, TX - On April 15, 2025, Valuease, Inc., an emerging player in property technology, revealed their latest offering in the form of CMAsnap Rentals. This innovative feature is an expansion of their successful Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) tool, CMAsnap. This addition aims to revolutionize rental pricing in the industry.
news.headline: Valuease, Inc. introduces CMAsnap Rentals feature, modernizing property management with powerful CMA tool.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, STAG Industrial, Inc. disclosed entering a note purchase agreement to release $550 million in fixed rate senior unsecured notes through a private placement offering. The notes carry a weighted average fixed interest rate. STAG is listed on the NYSE under the symbol STAG.
news.headline: STAG Industrial to issue $550 million senior unsecured notes with fixed interest rate in private placement deal.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 15, 2025, Freehold Royalties Ltd. (Freehold) (TSX: FRU) has revealed that the Board of Directors approved a dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share. The payment date for this dividend is set for May 15, 2025, and it will be distributed to shareholders who are recorded as such on April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Freehold Royalties (TSX: FRU) declares dividend of Cdn. $0.09 per common share to be paid on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: On April 30, 2025, New York Mortgage Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq: NYMT) will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes. The Company's executive management will conduct a conference call and audio webcast on May 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate in the call, registration is required through a provided link. Registered participants will receive confirmation and details for dialing in to the conference call.
news.headline: New York Mortgage Trust to report Q1 financial results on April 30, 2025, with conference call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on April 15, 2025, ARRAY Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARRY), a prominent provider of utility-scale solar tracking solutions, shared plans to unveil their first quarter financial results for 2025. The disclosure is scheduled for Tuesday, May 6, 2025, before the market opens. A corresponding conference call is set for 8:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day to discuss these results.
news.headline: ARRAY Technologies, Inc. will release Q1 2025 earnings on May 6, 2025, with conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Sernova Biotherapeutics, a prominent regenerative medicine company, revealed that their Cell Pouch Bio-hybrid Organ, intended as a functional cure for type 1 diabetes (T1D), will be showcased at the 2025 Cell & Gene Meeting on the Med conference in Rome, Italy on Wednesday, April 16, 2025. The company's stock (TSX: SVA) (OTCQB: SEOVF) (FSE/XETRA: PSH) will be discussed in a panel session titled Diabetes – Cell and Tissue Therapy Approaches to Provide Durable Therapeutic Solutions. This event marks a significant step in advancing the innovative treatment, aimed at providing lasting solutions for T1D patients.
news.headline: Sernova Biotherapeutics to showcase Cell Pouch Bio-hybrid Organ for diabetes at Cell & Gene Meeting, April 16 in Rome.

news.summary: According to recent reports from industry analysts, the global smartphone market witnessed a decline of 5.7% in sales during the last quarter of 2021 compared to the previous year. The total number of smartphones sold during this quarter was approximately 330 million units. Market leaders like Apple and Samsung also experienced a decrease in sales, with Apple selling around 68 million units and Samsung selling approximately 62 million units. Despite these challenges, Chinese smartphone companies like Xiaomi and Oppo saw growth in their sales figures, capturing a larger market share in various regions. Overall, the smartphone market continues to face challenges due to supply chain disruptions and changing consumer behaviors.
news.headline: Trade tensions escalate as Japan struggles to secure favorable terms; implications for global markets.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there was a total revenue of $3.7 billion, showing an organic growth of 3.4%. The net income for this period was $287.7 million. The diluted earnings per share were reported at $1.45, whereas the non-GAAP adjusted earnings per share stood at $1.70. The operating income was $452.6 million on a non-GAAP adjusted basis. Additionally, the non-GAAP adjusted EBITA was $508.2 million, showcasing a margin of 13.8%. This information was released from New York on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Omnicom's Q1 2025 revenue $3.7B, organic growth 3.4%, net income $287.7M, diluted EPS $1.45, margin 13.8%.

news.summary: Inseego has recently appointed a new product innovator to T-Mobile, aiming to enhance carrier-focused product innovation and bolster its market presence. This move signifies Inseego's strategic growth plan and commitment to delivering cutting-edge solutions to customers. With this addition to its leadership team, Inseego aims to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the market and further solidify its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Ryan Sullivan, T-Mobile product innovator, joins Inseego as SVP of Carrier Product Management, enhancing market position.
Sasidhar Valluru named director of global product delivery at Healthcare Integrated Technologies Inc.

news.summary: In December 2024, the preliminary findings from the randomized Phase 2 CRDF-004 study in patients with RAS-mutated metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC) were disclosed.
news.headline: Cardiff Oncology finishes enrolling for Phase 2 CRDF-004 trial on Onvansertib for 1st-line RAS-mutated mCRC; initial results by Dec 2024.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 15, 2025, Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) declared that Rob C. Holmes, the President & Chief Executive Officer, has been appointed as the Chairman of the Board following TCBI’s 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Holmes, in his role since 2021, was chosen unanimously for this position by the Board of Directors in January 2025.
news.headline: Rob C. Holmes is now Chairman of the Board at Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: TCBI) after unanimous election.

news.summary: Nobel Prize laureates Prof. Shechtman and Prof. Kornberg have teamed up to progress treatments for Autism Spectrum Disorder and Alzheimer’s Disease.  Collaborating on research initiatives, they aim to leverage their expertise to make strides in combating these prevalent disorders impacting millions worldwide. Their combined knowledge and dedication are poised to drive advancements in the field and potentially pave the way for groundbreaking therapeutic solutions.
news.headline: NeuroNOS appoints Nobel Laureate Shechtman to the Advisory Board, along with Kornberg, for treatments for Autism and Alzheimer's.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) unveiled its 2024 Snacking Made Right Report, showcasing advancements towards its Sustainability objectives. The report emphasizes the Company's continuous efforts to enhance the sustainability of snacking, affirming its pledge to prioritize Sustainability as a fundamental component of its overarching Strategy, aligning it with Growth, Execution, and Culture.
news.headline: Mondelēz International releases 2024 Sustainability report, focusing on making snacking more sustainable. Commitment to Sustainability emphasized.
